description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte gray finish and a streamlined, angular receiver. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the handguard, and is paired with a tan-colored fore-end and grip area, suggesting a polymer or composite material for improved ergonomics. The receiver includes a prominent ejection port and a raised section that may accommodate optics or accessory rails. The stock is integrated into the rear of the receiver, appearing fixed and robust, with no visible adjustment mechanisms. The magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or not modeled. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, gray tactical rifle with a long barrel, tan grip, and integrated fixed stock. The design is streamlined and robust, with no visible magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the long barrel, tan grip, and the angular receiver with a visible ejection port.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the twin barrel openings and the symmetry of the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the long barrel and tan grip, with the receiver's details mirrored from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the grip and handguard visible below.
